signals.headline: Tether Commits $150M to Rescue Solana's Drift Protocol After $285M Exploit | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Tether Commits $150M to Rescue Solana's Drift Protocol After $285M Exploit | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Tether announced on April 16, 2026, a recovery plan of up to $150M (including $127.5M from Tether) for users of Solana-based Drift Protocol, hit by a $285M exploit on April 1; the relaunch switches primary settlement to USDT, onboarding 128,000 users.[4]

signals.headline: Key details:** Statistics Korea confirmed the March data today, showing monthly CPI up 0
signals.raw: Key details:** Statistics Korea confirmed the March data today, showing monthly CPI up 0.3% (vs 0.6% expected); core inflation dipped to 2.2% YoY; transport rose 5% YoY from oil, but food fell to 0.5% YoY. Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last week, expects inflation at 2.2% for 2026 amid Middle East energy shocks; no policy shift announced. This miss vs forecasts could ease prediction market bets

signals.headline: Solana Spot ETFs See Continued Inflows ($5
signals.raw:
Solana Spot ETFs See Continued Inflows ($5.04M on Apr 16) | YES | MED confidence**  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs recorded $5.04M net inflows on April 16, following $5.36M the prior day, signaling sustained institutional demand separate from retail.[4]  
Prices show SOL at ~$86 (up 6.3% daily) and ETH at ~$2,377 (up 8.6%), with Solana's activity high but Ethereum leading in value-settled transactions.[1]
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 2:00PM-2:15PM ET

signals.headline: South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY in March 2026 (from 2.0% in Feb), below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps and vouchers offsetting oil price surges | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2]
